content:
- Picked up task `02-task-rewrite-ha-decide-into-facts-and-phase-outcome-match-machine` at the execution/verification stage after the skeptical-plan pass had already been promoted to `NOW EXECUTE`.
- Landed the HA decision rewrite around immutable `DecisionFacts`, pure `PhaseOutcome` handlers, explicit `HaDecision`, and separate lowering in `src/ha/lower.rs`; updated worker/API/CLI/debug/docs/tests to publish decision-centric state instead of `pending` action vectors.
- Fixed follow-up lint fallout by deriving `Default` on `HaDecision` and boxing the CLI `CommandOutput::HaState` payload to satisfy `large_enum_variant` without weakening the contract.
- Final validation evidence all green: `make check` run `20260306T045735Z-4109828-20093`, `make test` run `20260306T045737Z-4110005-6241`, `make test-long` run `20260306T045758Z-4111432-20413`, `make lint` run `20260306T051521Z-4118916-23547`.
- Updated the task file to `done` + `<passes>true</passes> <passing>true</passing>`, reconciled the stale story note that had deferred `make test-long`, and ran `/bin/bash .ralph/task_switch.sh` before closeout.
- Next engineer should start from the newly switched Ralph task; this HA rewrite task is ready to stage, commit, and push together with the `.ralph` bookkeeping files.

- Read .ralph/current_tasks.md end-to-end and applied the bug-first and blocker rules strictly.
- Found that every failing bug is still blocked. The HA functional rewrite chain is the highest-leverage unblocked path because task 06 in that story unblocks more deferred bugs than the backup-removal story, and tasks 01-02 in that story are already complete.
- Wrote .ralph/current_task.txt with .ralph/tasks/story-ha-functional-rewrite/03-task-replace-action-vectors-and-pending-state-with-typed-domain-effect-plan.md.

- Read previous progress, `.ralph/current_task.txt`, and the pointed task file for `03-task-replace-action-vectors-and-pending-state-with-typed-domain-effect-plan`.
- Verified the repo already contains partial progress (`DecisionFacts`, `PhaseOutcome`, `HaDecision`, `decision` in `HaState`), but the task is still incomplete because `src/ha/lower.rs` still lowers to `Vec<HaAction>` and API/CLI still stringify HA state fields.
- Wrote a full execution plan into the task file and ended it with `TO BE VERIFIED` exactly per workflow. The plan calls out the real remaining work: add typed `HaEffectPlan`, move to inherent `HaDecision::lower()`, strengthen decision payloads, replace stringly typed API/CLI contracts, update docs/tests, then run `make check`, `make test`, `make test-long`, and `make lint` before completion bookkeeping.
- Next engineer should start by performing the skeptical `TO BE VERIFIED` pass, alter at least one substantive part of the plan, replace the marker with `NOW EXECUTE`, and only then execute without further exploration.

- Read the active Ralph task `03-task-replace-action-vectors-and-pending-state-with-typed-domain-effect-plan` and found it in the `TO BE VERIFIED` phase.
- Performed a skeptical review against the live code in `src/ha/{decision,lower,worker,state}.rs`, `src/api/{mod,controller}.rs`, `src/cli/{client,output}.rs`, and `docs/src/contributors/ha-pipeline.md`.
- Made two substantive plan corrections before promotion: the worker must dispatch `HaEffectPlan` directly instead of preserving a derived `Vec<HaAction>` boundary, and API/CLI must share one transport contract instead of keeping mirrored response schemas.
- Replaced the task marker with `NOW EXECUTE` so the next engineer can execute the plan without fresh exploration.
- Next engineer should start from the task file in execution mode and implement exactly that tightened plan, then run the full required gates including `make test-long` before any completion bookkeeping.

- Implemented a shared HA transport contract in `src/api/mod.rs` and reused it from the CLI by re-exporting the API response types in `src/cli/client.rs`.
- Replaced stringly typed `dcs_trust`, `ha_phase`, and flat decision/detail fields with typed enums plus a tagged `HaDecisionResponse`; added controller mapping in `src/api/controller.rs` and updated API/CLI tests and text rendering.
- Added `Display` support for the transport enums so existing e2e harness formatting keeps working with the new typed `ha_phase`, and patched the one `BTreeSet<String>` insertion site in `src/ha/e2e_multi_node.rs`.
- Validation is currently blocked by concurrent non-transport changes already present in the tree: `src/ha/lower.rs` is missing while still declared in `src/ha/mod.rs`, and several files outside my scope still reference removed `HaDecision::label()` / `detail()` helpers or stale decision variants.
- Next step for the parent engineer: integrate these API/CLI transport changes with the in-flight HA decision/lowering rewrite, then rerun cargo/make gates once the core HA compile breaks are resolved.
